completed_slice: Added a deterministic privacy-safe environment handoff builder, tests, and a read-only GitHub Actions workflow that publishes the handoff artifact without requiring credentials.

progress.verification: 3 deterministic Node tests passed; the artifact records names and null configuration fields only.

blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub Environment still requires CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN before the production deployment workflow can establish a resolving URL and served commit identity.
next_action: Run the readiness-handoff workflow to retain the generated operator artifact, configure the two environment secrets through GitHub, then dispatch cloudflare-pages-research.yml and accept C-001 only after URL, identity, commit, signature, and policy checks pass.
